candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate top-line total revenue row with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes across years.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label.
Equivalent COGS/cost of sales label; good fallback.

candidates.why: Inventory component on balance sheet, not income statement COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should not be preferred over the reported COGS line.

variables.notes: Using direct COGS labels as a priority list.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-style overhead row and populated; per hierarchy, select only this row when present.
Administrative component, but should not be used when explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Administrative overhead component, but explicit SG&A row is preferable.
Could include mixed items and is below/adjacent to other operating income; less clean than explicit SG&A.
Potential overhead component, but appears unpopulated in preview and unnecessary because explicit SG&A exists.
Staff cost disclosure, but explicit SG&A row exists and should be preferred.
R&D supplemental disclosure exists, but it appears below operating profit/EBIT area, so do not include in XSGA under the placement rule.
Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row. Did not add the supplemental R&D line because it appears below operating result in the preview and is not a primary above-EBIT operating expense line.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D expense line present.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists, but it appears as a supplemental disclosure below operating result in the preview, so it is mapped to XRD only and not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line including FX and other items; fallback only if no dedicated interest line is usable.

Interest-related but narrower component, not the main interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest expense component/supplemental disclosure; possible fallback if reporting label changes.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense according to the effective interest method from interest-bearing liabilities recognized at amortized cost
Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortized cost

variables.notes: Used an Income Statement row outside the candidate list because the candidates missed a more semantically precise dedicated interest expense label: 'Interest expense according to the effective interest method from interest-bearing liabilities recognized at amortized cost'. candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.

Usable only if no parent-only equity line exists; here parent-only equity does exist.

Income statement profit allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement OCI/comprehensive income allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.

Equivalent balance sheet minority equity label; useful fallback.
